latest.title: Elephants don't just eat with their trunks

latest.title: Horses chew sideways and you didn’t notice
latest.script_key: watch their molars slide sideways when they chew alfalfa that s because horses only grind on one side at a time shifting food across their massive flat teeth that s why you ll never see them bite straight down ever tried chewing like that that s the weird part
